What live data covers

Live mode reads the public LACCD schedule + program map: you get the full 2-year schedule plus rotation, single-section and waitlist signals. Enrollment / capacity counts aren’t published by any LACCD API, so capacity / fill-rate analysis needs those numbers — add an enrollment export on the live form (experimental), or use Option 1 and upload a workbook that already includes them.

Live data reconciliation

LAMC · terms 2268, 2272 · Biology AS-T (AS-T)
6 program courses offered in the fetched terms · 2 not offered

PHYSICS 6GEOG 15

Program buildability (terms 2268, 2272)

Structural-feasibility PROXY, not a measured completion rate.

GE-inclusive buildability — a structural-coverage PROXY ...

⊘ Biology <AS-T> — score 47/100
GE-inclusive: major-only 55/100, Δ -8; 1/2 GE areas schedulable, gaps 4 (DRAFT GE counts).
3/4 required courses offered; 1 missing; has time conflicts.
  • Not offered: PHYSICS 6
  • De-catalogued: GEOG 15
  • Time conflict: BIOLOGY 3 & CHEM 101
  • Term 2 clash: MATH 261, CHEM 102
  • Unsatisfiable choice: ANTHRO 101, ANTHRO 102
  • Single-section risk: BIOLOGY 3
  • CHEM 101 mapped to Fall but offered Spring
  • MATH 261 seat pressure (98% fill)
  • By-design (not flagged): PE 100

Cross-program bottlenecks

Cross-program bottleneck ranking — a structural supply-vs-demand PROXY, NOT a measured completion rate.

⊘ MATH <227> — risk 19.5 · 15 programs · 1 section
required by 15 programs; single section in at least one offered term; at 96% fill — Biology AS-T, Chemistry AS-T
Required across programs but not offered:
  • PHYSICS 6 — required by 4 program(s), not offered

2 program-list course(s) could not be matched to an offered section (course ids aren’t leading-zero-collapsed) — excluded, not silently counted. 3 more ranked course(s) beyond the top shown. 7 more required-but-not-offered course(s) beyond those shown.

Grid conformance & morning compression

Grid-conformance & morning-compression — a structural time-block PROXY, not a measured completion rate.

feasibility is not verified

⊘ MATH <2> & CHEM 1
both 9-1; overlap

What this live build can measure

These depend on data the public schedule API doesn’t include. An empty result here means “not yet measurable,” not “all clear.”

✓ Capacity / fill-rate analysis — on
joined 4/6 sections
Capacity / fill-rate analysis from your enrollment export
how: fill-rate computed on 4 of 6 sections
✓ Prerequisite ordering — on
4 prerequisites applied (1 relaxed)
Prerequisite ordering from eLumen
how: applied on the program path
⊘ Time-block conflicts — needs more data
some sections have no posted meeting time
to enable: supply day/time on every section
